name: Deep Dive Gill Grunt
description: Deep Dive Gill Grunt is the SuperChargers counterpart of the veteran Gillman, Gill Grunt. Armed with a trident and an advanced water jetpack, he takes to the fight with a mix of sea-powered force and electrical energy.
biography: Deep Dive Gill Grunt is a Gillman soldier who has upgraded his arsenal with a powerful trident. He uses this weapon to jab opponents and unleash devastating blasts of lightning. Complementing his melee prowess, his new jetpack allows him to hover and create tidal waves that wash away foes. His most powerful technique allows him to channel the storms of the sea to rain lightning down on his enemies.
personality: Deep Dive Gill Grunt is a stoic and disciplined soldier who remains humble despite his vast experience. He is known for his tenacity, adhering to the mantra that 'Gillmen never give up.' He is highly respectful of authority figures like Buzz and is driven by a sense of duty to his team and his mission across the Eleven Seas.

story.content: Deep Dive Gill Grunt is the SuperChargers counterpart of Gill Grunt in Skylanders: SuperChargers. His signature vehicle is the Reef Ripper. He has taken his combat skills to the next level by mastering the trident and lightning powers of the deep seas.

content: Time to fish or cut bait!
Fightin' pirates keeps me sharp. I've been all across the Eleven Seas searchin' for what they took from me.
Nah, I'm just a soldier who's good at getting' out of hot waters.
She's ship-shape, and ready for anything. Just say the word, skipper - uh, I mean Buzz... oh.
Thank you, sir! Just doin' our part for the team.
That goes without sayin', ha! What is it?
That's a good offer, Buzz, but I'd be a fish out of water. I'll leave that to you.

trivia: Unlike his previous versions, Deep Dive Gill Grunt's water jetpack (if the Water Weaver path isn't chosen) doesn't require seconds of recharging. However, the feature of his new jetpack is based on choosing the Water Weaver path.
He, Zap, Punk Shock, and Wham-Shell are the only Water Skylanders with electricity-based abilities.
Deep Dive Gill Grunt is the first Water Skylander that can use electricity-based abilities, but is not from royalty.

Deep Dive Gill Grunt was originally conceptualized with a plethora of alternative designs. Some concepts wore hats, overalls, or goggles; others wielded a form of gun; one was even designed as anglerfish; and one was sheathed in metallic armor.

When he, Big Bubble Pop Fizz, Super Shot Stealth Elf and Bone Bash Roller Brawl are placed on the portal, they say their official catchphrases in a slightly different tone of their voices. This also applies to most of their quotes, which have been completely re-recorded.
Deep Dive Gill Grunt has similarities to the DC Comics hero, Aquaman. Both are connected to sea life, both have green and orange in their color schemes and they both have tridents for weapons.
Although not included in the game, Deep Dive Gill Grunt can be seen on promotional artwork of Skylanders: Ring of Heroes.

trailers.name: Skylanders SuperChargers - Deep Dive Gill Grunt's Soul Gem Preview (Fear the Fish)
Meet the Skylanders SuperChargers Gill Grunt and Reef Ripper

gameplay: Deep Dive Gill Grunt specializes in balanced combat, combining trident strikes with long-range lightning. His jetpack provides significant mobility, allowing him to transition between ground combat and hovering. His upgrade paths allow players to focus on either wave-based water maneuvers or intensifying his electrical storm abilities. unlike previous iterations, his basic jetpack functionality is more fluid and integrated into his combat style.

basic.name: Trident Thrust
basic.content: Press Attack 1 to attack enemies with your trident.

basic.name: Power of the Seas
basic.content: Press Attack 2 to attack enemies with a long range lightning attack.

basic_upgrades.name: Typhoon Turbine Jetpack
basic_upgrades.content: Press Attack 3 to begin hovering with your Jetpack. Press Attack 1 to dash forward or Press Attack 2 to send out a tidal wave. Press Attack 3 again to land on the ground.

basic_upgrades.name: Trident True
basic_upgrades.content: Hold Attack 1 when not using the Jetpack to rapidly attack nearby enemies.

basic_upgrades.name: Wild Whirlpool
basic_upgrades.content: Hold Attack 2 while using the Jetpack to create a large whirlpool that damages nearby enemies.

basic_upgrades.name: Trident Unleashed
basic_upgrades.content: Trident attacks do more damage. Unleash the Trident!

soulgems.name: Storm of the Seas
soulgems.content: Hold down Attack 2 while not using the jetpack to summon a powerful lightning storm!

abilities.name: Wave Jumper
abilities.content: Press Attack 3 to begin hovering with your Jetpack. Press Attack 3 again to land on the ground. Entering or exiting Jetpack mode causes a water explosion that damages nearby enemies.

abilities.name: Tubular Tidal Wave
abilities.content: Press Attack 2 to shoot out three large waves in Jetpack mode.

abilities.name: Drive the Wave
abilities.content: Hold Attack 1 in Jetpack mode to ride a huge tidal wave!

abilities.name: Lightning Strikes
abilities.content: Hold Attack 1 while not using the Jetpack to rapidly attack nearby enemies with lightning.

abilities.name: Shocking Transition
abilities.content: Press Attack 3 to begin with hovering with your Jetpack. Press Attack 3 again to land on the ground. Entering Jetpack mode causes a lightning explosion that damages nearby enemies.

abilities.name: Lightning Build-Up
abilities.content: Lightning attacks do more damage. Storm powered!
